packageRules.description: GitHub Actions are owned by Dependabot's weekly grouped SHA-refresh PR. Disable Renovate for github-actions so the two bots do not create duplicate digest PRs.
Group Docker digest refreshes into one weekly reviewed PR. Digest churn is normal, but daily one-image PRs add CI load without improving safety.
Batch Playwright monorepo updates weekly so Browser CI image refreshes are deliberate and reuse the fingerprint-cache path instead of producing daily PR pressure.

Docker OS base-image bumps (ubuntu, debian, alpine…) must pass CI before merging. They can break compiled binaries, rename packages, or change system defaults. Renovate creates the PR; a human merges after CI is green.

Hold eslint at v9 until neostandard supports eslint ^10. neostandard@0.13.0 (latest as of 2026-05-12) declares peerDependencies: { eslint: "^9.0.0" }, so eslint v10 is structurally incompatible. Re-enable when neostandard publishes a release with eslint ^10 in its peer range. See PR #375 for context.
